title: buxus benguellensis var. benguellensis
intro: Buxus benguellensis var. benguellensis, also known as Benguelense Boxwood, is a species of evergreen shrub that belongs to the Buxaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Buxus benguellensis var. benguellensis include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
